description: Style Note Now give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product Details Black sandal with thick connecting forefoot and midfoot straps  Smooth and padded footbed Outsole adhered to the upper for durability TRP outsole with patterned grooves and an arched midfoot Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
